differences.title: 1. PRIMARY FOCUS
differences.leftDesc: Optimized for static content, blogs, and marketing sites.
differences.rightDesc: Versatile for dynamic apps, APIs, and server rendering.

differences.title: 2. RENDERING APPROACH
differences.leftDesc: Ships zero JS by default, hydrates interactive islands.
differences.rightDesc: Supports SSR, SSG, ISR, and CSR.

differences.title: 3. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Excellent initial load times due to minimal JavaScript.
differences.rightDesc: Strong performance with code splitting and optimizations.

differences.title: 4. JAVASCRIPT SHIPPING
differences.leftDesc: Only ships JS for interactive components (islands).

differences.title: 5. INTEGRATIONS
differences.leftDesc: Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Preact, and more.
differences.rightDesc: Deeply integrated with React and its ecosystem.

differences.title: 6. DEVELOPMENT COMPLEXITY
differences.leftDesc: Easier to get started for static site generation.
differences.rightDesc: More powerful but steeper learning curve.

differences.title: 7. USE CASES
differences.leftDesc: Ideal for blogs, portfolios, documentation, and landing pages.
differences.rightDesc: Perfect for complex dashboards, SaaS, and e-commerce.
